results.payload:
Contents of http://fixture.local/fetch_fixture.html:
This page is a frozen fixture served locally during result-fixture
capture (T037). It exists so the `fetch:fetch` tool has a
deterministic document to convert to markdown.

## Reference servers

* filesystem — directory listings
* git — commit history
* sqlite — tabular query results
* time — current time lookup
* fetch — this document

Immutable once committed; a refresh is a new `_v2` file.

Commit history:
Commit: '048f84bc39fd17b10c94d2b9af61860456cd48a4'
Author: <git.Actor "Algis Dumbris <a.dumbris@gmail.com>">
Date: 2026-07-14 12:00:00+00:00
Message: 'docs(spec): add 083-discovery-profiler spec, plan, tasks

Related #175

Discovery Effectiveness Profiler: extends bench/ to measure retrieve_tools
response cost (span-based token attribution, break-even), encoding arms
(baseline/compact/TSCG/TOON/TRON), public corpora (ToolRet, LiveMCPTool),
LAP as independent CI verdict, report v2 + public dashboard.

Spec and plan cross-reviewed by Codex (4 rounds each, approved).

## Changes
- spec.md with 23 FRs / 8 SCs, Codex-approved
- plan.md, research.md (12 decisions), data-model.md, quickstart.md
- contracts/: arm-interface.md, report-v2.schema.json (validated)
- tasks.md: 41 TDD-paired tasks in 9 phases
- ROADMAP.md regenerated (083 row)

## Testing
- report-v2.schema.json conditionals verified with Draft202012Validator
'

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>

* chore(deps): hold typescript at 6.x — 7.0 breaks the eslint peer range

Dependabot's group bump took typescript from ^6.0.0 to ^7.0.2, which npm ci
refuses: @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin@8.63.0 declares
peer typescript ">=4.8.4 <6.1.0", so the whole install ERESOLVEs and every
frontend job fails.

The other nine updates in the group are fine and are kept. TypeScript stays on
6.x until the eslint toolchain supports 7 — a major TS bump is its own change,
not a drive-by inside a dependency group, especially on the way into a release.

Verified with the exact CI sequence: npm ci resolves, vue-tsc --noEmit clean,
297/297 frontend tests pass, build succeeds.

---------

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>
Co-authored-by: dependabot[bot] <49699333+dependabot[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Dumbris <a.dumbris@gmail.com>'
